title: Error accessing undefined property in Function node
symptom: The workflow sometimes throws an error stating 'Cannot read property 'json' of undefined', causing it to stop execution.
applies_when: Using Function node to process items
Looping through an array of items
not_this_if: The loop condition is correctly set
root_cause: The loop condition in the Function node is incorrectly set to 'i <= items.length', which causes it to attempt to access an index that is out of bounds, leading to an undefined error.
fix_steps: Change the loop condition from 'i <= items.length' to 'i < items.length'
Ensure that the return statement is outside the loop to process all items.
agent_instruction: Update the loop condition in the Function node to prevent accessing undefined properties.
